title: Update menu item images: Porsian (5pcs), Party Pack 40pcs (40pcs), Party Pack 50pcs (50pcs)

requirements.text: Update the Porsian menu item image to show 5 pieces of dimsum.
acceptanceCriteria: The Porsian menu card displays a new image depicting 5 pieces of dimsum.
The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

requirements.text: Update the Party Pack 40pcs menu item image to show 40 pieces of dimsum.
acceptanceCriteria: The Party Pack 40pcs menu card displays a new image depicting 40 pieces of dimsum.
The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

requirements.text: Update the Party Pack 50pcs menu item image to show 50 pieces of dimsum.
acceptanceCriteria: The Party Pack 50pcs menu card displays a new image depicting 50 pieces of dimsum.
The image is saved as a generated static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

requirements.text: Render the three newly generated menu images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated and reference them in Menu.tsx for the Porsian, Party Pack 40pcs, and Party Pack 50pcs menu cards respectively.
acceptanceCriteria: Menu.tsx imports and displays porsian-menu.png for the Porsian card.
Menu.tsx imports and displays party-pack-40pcs-menu.png for the Party Pack 40pcs card.
Menu.tsx imports and displays party-pack-50pcs-menu.png for the Party Pack 50pcs card.
All three images load without errors in the browser.

constraints: Do not change any menu item names, prices, descriptions, or ingredient checkboxes.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
All generated images must be placed under frontend/public/assets/generated.
nonGoals: Changing order form or cart logic.

required: Overhead close-up food photo of 5 steamed dimsum dumplings arranged neatly on a bamboo steamer, warm appetizing lighting, clean background (porsian-menu.dim_600x400.png)

Overhead close-up food photo of 40 steamed dimsum dumplings arranged in multiple bamboo steamers stacked together, warm appetizing lighting, festive abundance feel (party-pack-40pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png)

Overhead close-up food photo of 50 steamed dimsum dumplings arranged in multiple bamboo steamers stacked together, warm appetizing lighting, festive abundance feel, slightly larger spread than 40pcs presentation (party-pack-50pcs-menu.dim_600x400.png)
